task.title: Release new version of VS Code extension to ship markdown formatting
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23857

It looks as if we never shipped a VS Code extension version with the new markdown formatting. Is this intentional? What's left to do?

rating.rationale: Agent produced no output whatsoever. The task required investigating whether the VS Code extension version was intentionally not shipped and identifying what's left to do — a low-complexity research task. Complete failure to engage with the task.
